name: Fang city center
notes: Town-center anchor for Wiang Fang and the main commercial strip on Route 107.

name: Lotus's Fang
notes: Large retail anchor on Chiang Mai-Mae Chan Highway [107] in Wiang, Fang.

name: Makro Fang
notes: Wholesale retail anchor on Route 107 south of central Fang; supports regional shopping trips.

name: Fang Hospital
notes: Major district hospital on Route 107 and one of the strongest daily destination anchors in Fang.

name: Fang bus station / Yanyon Nakorn Chiang Mai branch
notes: Intercity bus node beside Fang Hospital with frequent services linking Fang, Mae Ai, Thaton, Chai Prakan, Chiang Dao, and Chiang Mai.

name: Fang Walking Street
notes: Sunday market and evening retail/tourism cluster in the town center.

name: Route 107 Fang commercial axis
notes: Main roadside demand spine through Fang town on the Chiang Mai-Mae Chan corridor.

name: Fang Immigration Checkpoint
notes: Government-service anchor in central Fang with weekday visit traffic.

name: Fang District Public Health Office
notes: District public-health office in the same core cluster as the walking street and municipal services.

name: Fang Hot Springs
notes: Flagship tourism destination west of town within Doi Pha Hom Pok National Park.

name: Chiang Mai Provincial Transport Office Fang branch
notes: Vehicle-registration and licensing anchor on Route 107 south of Fang town.

name: Mae Ai Hospital
notes: Important northern catchment hospital serving Mae Ai and border-adjacent communities.

name: Wat Tha Ton
notes: Major Mae Ai / Thaton tourism and pilgrimage anchor linked to the Fang-Thaton travel corridor.
